hooks.command: echo 'CONTEXT REMINDER: If context window is <20%, warn the user and suggest switching agents. Read AGENTS.md + docs/HANDOFF.md if this is a new session.'

echo '
━━━ SESSION CHECKPOINT ━━━
Did you update docs/HANDOFF.md with what was completed?
Run: npm run build  →  confirm 0 new errors
Then update HANDOFF.md before ending the session.
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━'
